chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD Cr. B.A. No. S- 956 of 2017 DATED ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 29.01.2018 For orders on office objection For hearing Mr. Tahir Nisar Rajput, advocate for applicant Mr. Shahid Ahmed Shaikh, D.P.G. Learned counsel on instructions from his client states that the trial court has acquitted the applicant, therefore, he does not wish to press this bail application which is dismissed as withdrawn. JUDGE karar_hussain /PS*
